_comment: Project-local override for /shipwright-compliance detective audit. Merges shallowly over the plugin _DEFAULT_CONFIG (audit_detector.py). Only keys present here override; everything else keeps plugin defaults. shipwright-webui is an adopted monorepo-style project with no plan-config splits, so conventional-commit scopes are cross-cutting component names rather than split slugs — the g2_stoplist below enumerates every scope in active use so G2 stops flagging them. Added 2026-05-15 as part of the Iterate K/M compliance-hygiene cleanup.
